data.body: Investigation complete (bot-psychologist). Root cause DUAL: (1) complexity-evaluator rubric has no forcing function for SC count >6 or scenario_survivor_count >=10; 'external_integration' override is ambiguously worded excluding library/SDK deps; (2) brainstorm Step 4a dispatches evaluator without session-computed SC count or scenario_survivor_count. Taxonomy: Non-Deterministic Logic (#12) + Silent Instruction Truncation (#3). All 4 hypothesis tests confirmed. Files affected: complexity-evaluator.md (lines ~215), brainstorm/SKILL.md (lines 488-499, 503-512). Confidence: HIGH. Step 3.5: PASS.
